mapper.select: SELECT setting_code_id, setting_group_name, setting_name, default_yn, use_yn, user_id FROM setting_code WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY setting_group_name, setting_code_id
SELECT setting_code_id, setting_group_name, setting_name, default_yn, use_yn, user_id FROM setting_code WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND setting_group_name = #{settingGroupName} ORDER BY setting_code_id
SELECT setting_code_id, setting_group_name, setting_name, default_yn, use_yn, user_id FROM setting_code WHERE setting_code_id = #{settingCodeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO setting_code ( setting_code_id, setting_group_name, setting_name, default_yn, use_yn, user_id ) VALUES ( setting_code_seq.NEXTVAL, #{settingGroupName}, #{settingName}, #{defaultYn}, #{useYn}, #{userId} )
